w2:box1.label: Wages, tips, other comp.
w2:box1.so: Tani waa wadarta lacagta aad shaqadaada ka heshay sanadkan oo dhan, ka hor inta aan canshuurta laga jarin.
w2:box1.en: This is the total money you earned from your job this year, before any taxes were taken out.

w2:box2.label: Federal income tax withheld
w2:box2.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta federaalka ah ee loo-shaqeeyahaagu mushaharkaaga ka jaray, oo uu dawladda kuugu diray.
w2:box2.en: This is the federal tax your employer already took out of your paychecks and sent to the government for you.

w2:box3.label: Social security wages
w2:box3.so: Tani waa qaybta mushaharkaaga ee loo xisaabiyo Social Security — lacag ku taageeraysa marka aad hawlgabto.
w2:box3.en: This is the part of your pay counted toward Social Security — money that helps support you when you retire.

w2:box4.label: Social security tax withheld
w2:box4.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta Social Security ee loo-shaqeeyahaagu mushaharkaaga ka jaray.
w2:box4.en: This is the Social Security tax amount your employer took out of your pay.

w2:box5.label: Medicare wages & tips
w2:box5.so: Tani waa qaybta mushaharkaaga ee loo xisaabiyo Medicare — kaasoo gaashaan caafimaadka.
w2:box5.en: This is the part of your pay counted toward Medicare — health insurance for seniors.

w2:box6.label: Medicare tax withheld
w2:box6.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta Medicare ee loo-shaqeeyahaagu mushaharkaaga ka jaray.
w2:box6.en: This is the Medicare tax amount your employer took out of your pay.

w2:box16.label: State wages, tips, etc.
w2:box16.so: Tani waa lacagta mushaharkaaga ee dowladda lagaga jaray canshuurta stateka.
w2:box16.en: This is the wages your state counted for calculating state income tax.

w2:box17.label: State income tax withheld
w2:box17.so: Tani waa lacagta canshuurta stateka ee loo-shaqeeyahaagu mushaharkaaga ka jaray.
w2:box17.en: This is the state income tax your employer took out of your paychecks.
